globalNews.title: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
globalNews.summary: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.

globalNews.title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
globalNews.summary: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

globalNews.title: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rise further, WHO warns
globalNews.summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

globalNews.title: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
globalNews.summary: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.

globalNews.title: Man who murdered teen TikTok star in Pakistan gets death sentence
globalNews.summary: Sana Yousaf's murder highlights a pattern of violence against women in Pakistan, activists say.

cryptoNews.title: Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is ‘structurally unsafe’ from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode
cryptoNews.summary: Analytics provider Glassnode identified 10% of Bitcoin supply as structurally exposed to a quantum breakthrough, underscoring the need for a quantum-proof implementation such as BIP-360.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
cryptoNews.summary: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

cryptoNews.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
cryptoNews.summary: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

cryptoNews.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
cryptoNews.summary: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

cryptoNews.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
cryptoNews.summary: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

aiNews.title: AI search startups are blowing up
aiNews.summary: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

aiNews.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create six-minute songs
aiNews.summary: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks

aiNews.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
aiNews.summary: NanoCo, the company behind  OpenClaw alternative NanoClaw, has raised a $12 million seed after a viral launch, the founders tell TechCrunch.

aiNews.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in one week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups ends May 27
aiNews.summary: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup here.

aiNews.title: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
aiNews.summary: Figma's new AI assistant will be first available on Figma Design

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
